<!-- indicator: fig-severe-housing -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-severe-housing
#| fig-cap: 'Percentage of Households with Severe Housing Problems, 2017–2021'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Percentage of Households with Severe Housing Problems, 2017–2021.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-severe-housing", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
